reviews.comment:
El cafe mas caro de ARGENTINA esta en las YPF  DOS CAFE CON MEDIALUNAS(4) ,2900.. MAS DE DOS MIL pesos... nos vieron la cara de estranjeros o el dolar ya paso los 800 pesos???...

(Translated by Google)
The most expensive coffee in Argentina is at YPF stations: two coffees with croissants (4) for 2900 pesos... more than two thousand pesos... are they taking us for foreigners or has the dollar already passed 800 pesos???
